text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice two Umamusume getting ready
for some pair running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a good session today, Ryan. I'm going
to run like it's the real thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! I'm with you on that one! I'm real
excited about running together, completely free!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The onlooking Umamusume begin to rouse with
excitement as the two racers pump themselves up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look! Those two are from the Mejiro family!
Doesn't it seem like they're taking this pretty...
seriously?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Are they about to run together? I've gotta see
this up close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... We've got a few eyes on us. I'm starting
to get nervous. What abou—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, s-sorry. Did you say something just now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Whenever I'm super nervous, I find that it's
easier to focus when I think about my favorite
things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So when my nerves get to me, I think about how
my muscles expand and contract... How about
giving that a shot?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. I'll try to keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Any time! All right, let's hit the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I don't like the thought of not being able to
match her at her best. I'll stay focused until the
very end!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Strawberries, apples, kiwis, mangoes, bananas,
grapes, pineapples!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Dober's picking up the pace?! Two can play at
that game!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eeeeeeek! Ryan! Dober! Good luck you two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Fruit parfait, parfait, parfait...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: PARFAAAAAIT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I did it? I gave it my best.. to the very end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! That was the bomb! Especially the way
you sped up at the end! You were all over me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Dober! Ryan! That was an amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A group of Umamusume who were captivated by
the intense race gather around the pair in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Dober! Your final spurt at the end was super cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The raucous cheers from the crowd slightly take
the edge off Mejiro Dober's run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was doing so well too... Guess I caved in again...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Awesome job there, Dober! You were more
focused than when I try to crush a set!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Dober! Ryan! That was an amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A group of Umamusume who were captivated by
the intense race gather around the pair in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The serious look on your face when you were
racing was breathtaking, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... th-thanks. Well, I'll see you all around...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... There she goes. Wow, even her exit is suave
and cool!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(...Guess she got all embarrassed. You really were
awesome though, Dober!)
